overview: This five-color control deck aims to outlast opponents by leveraging a wide array of removal and board wipes like Day of Judgment. It stabilizes early games with efficient answers, then transitions into a value-heavy late game using Stock Up to build an unblockable board presence. Jeskai Revelation serves as a flexible finisher that rewards spell-heavy turns, allowing you to close games efficiently once the board is clear.
win_conditions: Lethal damage from Jeskai Revelation on a turn with multiple spells
Overwhelming board presence using Stock Up auras to deal trample damage
Outlasting opponents in a grind until they run out of resources

keep_criteria: Hands with early interaction or board wipes
Hands containing Jeskai Revelation with cheap spells to enable it
Hands with Stock Up and a creature to equip
mulligan_criteria: Hands with only late-game finishers and no early answers
Hands lacking land drops or mana fixing
Hands with multiple high-cost board wipes and no removal

early_game: Play lands and hold up mana for interaction
Use cheap removal to handle early threats
Prioritize keeping the board clear to survive
mid_game: Cast Day of Judgment to reset the board when opponents commit resources
Begin equipping creatures with Stock Up to generate value
Cast Jeskai Revelation to trade efficiently or chip away at life totals
late_game: Flood the board with Stock Up auras to create unblockable attackers
Chain multiple spells together to maximize Jeskai Revelation damage
Grind out the game by cycling through your deck and outlasting the opponent

key_cards.name: Stock Up
key_cards.notes: Cast on your own creatures to grant trample and +1/+1. Prioritize equipping when you have multiple creatures to maximize the discount and create wide, unblockable boards.

key_cards.name: Jeskai Revelation
key_cards.notes: Hold up for combat tricks or cast on your turn after casting multiple spells. Use it to finish games or efficiently remove threats while advancing your own game plan.

key_cards.name: Day of Judgment
key_cards.notes: Cast when the opponent has a wide board or is about to commit to a lethal attack. Use it to clear the way for your Stock Up creatures or to buy time for more answers.

sequencing_tips: Cast Jeskai Revelation after other spells on the same turn to maximize its damage output
Hold up Day of Judgment until the opponent commits creatures to the board
Equip Stock Up to creatures that can immediately attack or block to maximize tempo
Prioritize removal over board wipes when the opponent has few threats

matchups.advice: Focus on early interaction and hold up Day of Judgment for their big turns. Use Jeskai Revelation to trade efficiently and buy time until you can stabilize with Stock Up.
Prioritize countering or removing key combo pieces early. Use Day of Judgment to disrupt creature-based combos and Jeskai Revelation to finish games before they can assemble their win condition.
Race the opponent by equipping Stock Up to multiple creatures and using Jeskai Revelation for incremental damage. Use Day of Judgment to clear their board and force them to rebuild.

common_threats: Other control decks with superior card advantage
